title: StreetComplete: Fixing OpenStreetMap, one tiny quest at a time
author: kls0e
aiHeadline: StreetComplete: Because who doesn't want to 'gamify' their contribution to OpenStreetMap? Now you can fix the world one tiny, meaningless quest at a time.

title: Microsoft fire idTech team at Id software
author: bauc
aiHeadline: Microsoft fires idTech team at Id software: Because what better way to show you're committed to innovation than by letting the people who actually make the games fun go?

title: Chat Control passed first round in EU Parliament
author: miroljub
aiHeadline: Chat Control passes first round in EU Parliament: Because nothing says 'we're on your side' like more regulations. Enjoy your freedom, internet!

title: 98% isn't much
author: speckx
aiHeadline: 98% isn't much: Because clearly, the only way to truly succeed is to be perfect. And if you're not perfect, well, you're just another failure statistic.
